flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Paul D Camp Community College rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.0k → $6.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Paul D Camp Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Paul D Camp Community College rose 89% between 2006 and 2009 (12.8% → 24.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Paul D Camp Community College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (42.7% → 57.9%).
